# freeswitch_user (Data Source)

Look up an existing SIP user by domain and number.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_user" "u2001" {
  domain = "192.168.48.143"
  number = "2001"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)
- `number` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `params` (Map of String, Sensitive)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `variables` (Map of String)
- `voicemail` (Attributes) Typed voicemail mailbox (null if the user has none). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--voicemail))

<a id="nestedatt--voicemail"></a>
### Nested Schema for `voicemail`

Read-Only:

- `attach_file` (Boolean)
- `email` (String)
- `email_all` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
